title: Quota Leasing Scheme - January 2026
body: "Additional Quota Leasing window January 2026  Offer of underutilised quota to vessels in the non-sector with over 10 metre: Category B, C and no-quota annex licences.  The MMO is opening a window for vessels in the non-sector with over 10 metre: Category B, C and no-quota annex licences to apply for access to underutilised quota. Vessels with these licences have a limited number of quota stocks for which they can fish. Under this scheme, these vessels can apply for access to additional opportunities for the remainder of 2026. At this stage, only stocks where the MMO is confident there is excess within the non-sector pools will be released.  The offer means that a small amount of the quota allocated to the English non-sector pools will be distributed via the MMO to these vessels upon application and depending on availability. This will enable vessels with restricted non-sector licences to fish for the leased quota stocks up to and including 31 December 2026.  Throughout 2026, MMO will hold three opportunities for quota leasing. The first window is now open for applications.  Applications for access to this quota leasing window should be emailed to fmc@marinemanagement.org.uk by 23:59 on Thursday 22 January 2026.  Two further quota leasing windows will be held later in the year. The second window is expected to be held in April, with the final window due to be in August. Applications received outside of these windows will only be considered in exceptional circumstances.  Applications must be completed using the form located below. Where there are competing proposals for stocks the MMO will consider applications based on the economic, environmental and social benefits provided by the proposed fishing activity, as evidenced by the responses given on the form.             MMO Quota leasing scheme form 2026    MS Word Document, 60.4 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email communications@marinemanagement.org.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      The stocks covered by this initiative are listed below, however other stocks may be considered:     Brill – Area 7de Skate and Rays – North Sea   Megrim - Area VII Sole - North Sea   Nephrops – North Sea Sole – Area 7d   Plaice – Area 7d Sprats – 7de   Plaice – North Sea Sprats – North Sea   Skate and Rays – Area 7d Whiting – North Sea    "
